certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode. No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys)
certificate.description: AWS-LC is a general-purpose cryptographic library maintained by the AWS Cryptography team for AWS and their customers. It іs based on code from the Google BoringSSL project and the OpenSSL project.
